title: Parse Key=Value Log Fields
description:
Parse a log line in `key=value key=value ...` format. Values may be double-quoted. Return each key-value pair on its own line as `key value`, sorted by key alphabetically.

Return an empty string for empty input.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.output:
latency 250ms
level ERROR
msg connection refused
service auth-api
examples.explanation: See test case: Mixed quoted and unquoted

test_cases.expected_output:
latency 250ms
level ERROR
msg connection refused
service auth-api

a hello world
b foo bar
